failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items even though the tool returned two matching available RGB mechanical keyboards priced above $233.90.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool returned relevant output at index 3 showing count=2, with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both above 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer: 'No items match that filter above the given price.' This directly contradicts the tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
